about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn more about our company and mission

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To empower businesses of all sizes with cutting-edge CRM technology that simplifies customer relationship management and drives growth. We believe every business deserves access to powerful tools that help them build stronger relationships with their customers.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To become the world's most trusted and innovative CRM platform, enabling businesses to create meaningful connections with their customers and achieve sustainable growth through technology-driven solutions.

company.title: About Our Company
company.content: Founded with a vision to revolutionize customer relationship management, our company has been at the forefront of CRM innovation. We combine advanced technology with user-friendly design to create solutions that make a real difference in how businesses operate and grow.

overview.title: Privacy Policy Overview
overview.content: This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our CRM platform. We are committed to ensuring your privacy is protected and that we comply with all applicable data protection laws.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect information to provide better services to our users. The types of information we collect include:

items.personal: Personal information such as name, email address, and contact details
items.usage: Usage data including how you interact with our platform
items.technical: Technical information such as IP address, browser type, and device information
items.communication: Communication data when you contact our support team

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.content: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:

items.service: To provide, maintain, and improve our services
items.communication: To communicate with you about our services and updates
items.improvement: To analyze usage patterns and improve user experience
items.legal: To comply with legal obligations and protect our rights

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. We use encryption and industry-standard security protocols to safeguard your data.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.content: You have certain rights regarding your personal information:

items.access: The right to access your personal information
items.correction: The right to correct inaccurate information
items.deletion: The right to request deletion of your information

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at privacy@skycrm.com or through our support channels.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Flexible user-based pricing that grows with your team. Pay only for what you need.
pricing.how_many_users: How many users do you need?
pricing.user_range: Enter any number from 1 to 1000+ users

small.name: Small Teams
small.description: Perfect for startups and small businesses

faq_section.billing_answer: You are billed monthly based on the number of users in your organization. You can add or remove users at any time.
faq_section.change_plan_answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately.
faq_section.payment_methods: What payment methods do you accept?
faq_section.payment_methods_answer: We accept all major credit cards, Meeza, and various local payment methods through Paymob.
faq_section.support_answer: All plans include email support. Medium and Large plans get priority support, and Large plans include phone support.
